mapper.sql: id, phone, password_hash, name, role, bank_name, bank_account_last4, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE role = #{roleName} ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, phone, password_hash, name, role, bank_name, bank_account_last4, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccountLast4}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET phone = #{phone}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, name = #{name}, role = #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account_last4 = #{bankAccountLast4}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}
